description: Cycles running at wrong times, duplicate runs, timezone issues, scheduler bugs, lock issues, audit trail gaps

incidents.title: Cycle calculation fails on month-end close
incidents.desc: Month-end cycle run aborts with ABL error 'STOP condition encountered'. Occurs consistently when posting batch exceeds 5 000 records. Stack trace points to cycle-post.p line 312.

incidents.title: Daily cycle runs twice on weekend schedule
incidents.desc: Job scheduler triggers CYCLE-DAILY twice on Saturday mornings at 02:00 and again at 02:05. Causes duplicate postings in GL. No changes were made to schedule config.

incidents.title: End-of-year cycle posts to wrong fiscal period
incidents.desc: Year-end cycle posts December transactions into January period when run after 23:00 on Dec 31. Server timezone offset (+8) not accounted for in period determination logic.

incidents.title: Cycle completion email not sent to ops team
incidents.desc: Post-cycle notification procedure notify-cycle-end.p calls SMTP relay but email is not delivered. SMTP logs show connection refused. Relay config may have changed.

incidents.title: Quarter-end cycle aborts on large portfolios
incidents.desc: Q1 cycle run aborts for portfolios exceeding 10 000 holdings with out-of-memory error. Memory buffer for cycle-qtr.p is set to 2GB but large portfolios require ~3.5GB.

incidents.title: Dividend cycle calculates incorrect ex-date
incidents.desc: Dividend cycle sets ex-date as record date minus 1 calendar day instead of minus 2 business days. Public holidays are not excluded from the calculation.

incidents.title: Cycle lock prevents concurrent user access
incidents.desc: When cycle is running all other users receive System locked for cycle processing even for read-only queries. Cycle lock should only block write transactions.

incidents.title: Overnight cycle posts duplicate interest entries
incidents.desc: Overnight interest accrual cycle creates two interest entries per account when run between 00:00 and 00:05. Race condition in INTEREST-ACCRUAL.p when cycle overlaps midnight.

incidents.title: Monthly cycle skips zero-balance accounts
incidents.desc: Monthly fee deduction cycle omits accounts with zero balance at cycle start. Accounts that receive intraday credits after cycle initiation should still be included.

incidents.title: Cycle audit log not written on partial run
incidents.desc: When a cycle run is manually interrupted the cycle_audit_log table is not updated with PARTIAL_COMPLETE status. Audit trail shows cycle as Running indefinitely.

incidents.title: Settlement cycle fails for T+3 bond trades
incidents.desc: Bond settlement cycle errors on T+3 trades with Settlement date cannot be in the past message. Settlement date calculation does not account for public holiday shifts.

incidents.title: EOD cycle timing out on large fund universe
incidents.desc: End-of-day NAV cycle times out after 4 hours for fund universes with 500+ funds. Query in nav-calc.p lacks index on FUND_STATUS filter causing full table scan.

incidents.title: Intraday cycle double-counts pending orders
incidents.desc: Intraday NAV cycle counts orders in PENDING_CONFIRM status twice inflating unit holdings by ~0.3% for affected funds.

bucket_label: Bank Name Missing in Documents & System
description: Bank name absent or wrong in PDFs, statements, confirmations, regulatory files, system data layer

incidents.title: Missing bank name in payment export file
incidents.desc: Generated GIRO export omits bank name field (field 14) for accounts linked to foreign correspondent banks. Downstream clearing system rejects file.

incidents.title: Bank name not populated on statement PDF
incidents.desc: PDF statements show N/A in bank name field for client accounts created before system migration in Dec 2023. Data exists in legacy table BANK_REF_OLD. Mapping script needed.

incidents.title: Bank SWIFT code missing from trade confirmation
incidents.desc: Trade confirmation emails omit SWIFT code for counterparty banks. Template variable resolves to blank. Variable was renamed in last release without updating template.

incidents.title: Bank name truncated at 30 chars in reports
incidents.desc: Report layout allocates only 30 characters for bank name field. Banks with longer names are truncated. Field width needs to be increased.

incidents.title: Bank name field blank in KYC documents
incidents.desc: Auto-generated KYC PDF documents have blank bank name in section 4. KYC template references old field name BANK_DISPLAY_NAME which was renamed to BANK_FULL_NAME.

incidents.title: Missing bank details on investor statement
incidents.desc: Annual investor statements omit beneficiary bank details for direct credit clients. Data exists but the statement merge procedure SELECT is missing the JOIN to BANK_DETAIL.

incidents.title: Bank routing number absent in wire instructions
incidents.desc: Wire transfer instruction documents omit ABA routing number for US correspondent banks. Field ROUTING_NO is populated but not included in the document template merge.

incidents.title: Bank name missing from FATCA reporting file
incidents.desc: FATCA XML report omits FinancialInstitution/Name element for non-Malaysian custodian banks. Foreign bank names are stored in a separate table not queried by the report procedure.

incidents.title: Counterparty bank name wrong in confirmations
incidents.desc: Trade confirmations display old bank name for counterparties that changed their bank name. System is reading from BANK_MASTER cache which is refreshed only weekly.

incidents.title: Bank identifier code blank in Swift messages
incidents.desc: Outbound MT103 and MT202 SWIFT messages have empty field 57A Account with Institution. BIC lookup fails for banks that joined after the last SWIFT directory import.

incidents.title: Beneficiary bank name missing in ACH file
incidents.desc: ACH batch file field 8 Receiving DFI Name is blank for 23 transactions. Affects banks where name contains special characters ampersands are stripped by the sanitisation routine.

incidents.title: Bank name not displayed in transaction history
incidents.desc: Transaction history screen shows bank account number but not bank name for inter-bank transfers. Bank name lookup JOIN is commented out in the transaction history view procedure.

incidents.title: Bank name field missing from CRS XML export
incidents.desc: CRS regulatory XML export omits the FIName element for non-Malaysian reportable accounts. Foreign institution names must be included per OECD CRS schema v2.0 requirements.

bucket_label: Bank Setup Missing for Funds, Clients & Instructions
description: Custodian, trustee, agent, or settlement bank not configured for funds or clients

incidents.title: Bank setup wizard skips BIC code entry
incidents.desc: When adding a new bank record the BIC/SWIFT field is not displayed. Field exists in schema but UI step 3 is not rendering the control. Affects all newly added banks.

incidents.title: Remittance bank details absent for new clients
incidents.desc: New clients registered via API onboarding have empty bank_details_id. The onboarding API endpoint does not call the bank-setup post-processing procedure.

incidents.title: Custodian bank not set up for new fund
incidents.desc: Fund TF-2025-003 launched without custodian bank record. NAV calculation module throws SYSERR-204 when attempting to settle transactions. Fund is currently unable to trade.

incidents.title: Interest rate not defaulted in bank setup
incidents.desc: New bank records do not inherit default interest rate tier from parent bank group. DEFAULT-RATE procedure is not called during bank record creation.

incidents.title: Clearing bank missing for FX settlement
incidents.desc: FX settlement module cannot find clearing bank for USD/MYR trades. Clearing bank record for CIMB Forex exists but is not linked to the FX settlement profile.

incidents.title: Trustee bank account not configured for fund
incidents.desc: Fund IFX-007 missing trustee bank account configuration. Distribution payments are failing at payment gateway with error PAYGT-NO-TRUSTEE.

incidents.title: Standing instruction bank not set
incidents.desc: New standing instructions created via bulk upload do not have beneficiary bank assigned. Bulk upload procedure inserts standing_instruction records but skips bank_link table.

incidents.title: Nominee bank account setup incomplete
incidents.desc: Nominee accounts created in batch do not have associated bank accounts. Batch creation script does not invoke the bank account setup sub-procedure.

incidents.title: Default settlement bank not assigned to manager
incidents.desc: Fund manager accounts created after Jan 2025 do not have a default settlement bank. The setup wizard v2.1 omitted the bank assignment step introduced in v2.0.

incidents.title: EPF bank details not configured
incidents.desc: EPF contribution module cannot locate bank details for new employer accounts. EPF-BANK-SETUP flag is not set during employer registration flow in the latest release.

incidents.title: Agent bank not set up for distribution fund
incidents.desc: Distribution fund DF-2025-012 has no agent bank configured. Investor subscription proceeds cannot be received. Fund was cloned from a template that had agent bank cleared.

incidents.title: Custodian sub-account bank setup missing
incidents.desc: Custodian sub-accounts for foreign securities do not have bank setup completed. Sub-account creation wizard exits after step 2 without proceeding to bank configuration step 3.

description: Menus freezing, collapsing, wrong redirects, 404s, keyboard conflicts, session issues

incidents.title: Navigation menu freezes on Fund Admin role
incidents.desc: After login as Fund Administrator the left nav panel becomes unresponsive. JavaScript console shows 'Cannot read property role of undefined'. Reproducible every time.

incidents.title: Back button on portfolio nav causes page reload
incidents.desc: Clicking browser back from portfolio detail returns to login screen instead of portfolio list. Session token is invalidated incorrectly on state pop.

incidents.title: Sidebar nav collapses unexpectedly on resize
incidents.desc: When browser window is resized below 1280px width the sidebar collapses to icon mode and does not re-expand on resize. Affects users with smaller monitors.

incidents.title: Dropdown nav breaks with 12+ menu items
incidents.desc: When a nav section has more than 12 items the dropdown renders off-screen and items are inaccessible. Affects Compliance module with 15 sub-menu items.

incidents.title: Mobile nav hamburger menu unresponsive
incidents.desc: On mobile view the hamburger menu icon does not respond to tap events. Touch event listener is attached to the desktop element ID which does not exist on mobile DOM.

incidents.title: Breadcrumb nav shows wrong parent module
incidents.desc: Breadcrumb trail on trade detail page shows Reports > Trade Detail instead of Trading > Trade Detail. Parent module lookup uses page ID instead of module hierarchy.

incidents.title: Tab navigation skips mandatory fields
incidents.desc: Pressing Tab on form pages skips over mandatory fields marked with red asterisk. Tab order index is set to -1 on required fields after a recent UI refactor.

incidents.title: Quick nav search returns no results
incidents.desc: Quick navigation search bar Ctrl+K returns empty results for all queries since the Feb 10 release. Search index was not rebuilt after the menu restructure.

incidents.title: Keyboard shortcut nav conflicts with browser
incidents.desc: Alt+Left shortcut for navigating to previous page conflicts with browser back shortcut. Application should use Ctrl+[ and Ctrl+] for in-app navigation instead.

incidents.title: Deep-link nav URL returns 404 after login
incidents.desc: Users who access a direct URL while logged out are redirected to login but after authentication are taken to dashboard instead of the original deep-link destination.

incidents.title: Context menu nav disappears on hover
incidents.desc: Right-click context menu in the data grid disappears immediately when mouse moves from trigger element to menu. CSS hover gap between trigger and menu needs to be filled.

incidents.title: Nav scroll position resets on page refresh
incidents.desc: When user refreshes the page the navigation sidebar scroll position resets to top. Users with many menu items lose their place frequently. Scroll position should be persisted in sessionStorage.

description: Incidents that did not match any root-cause bucket
